note: V11 banner — Jackpot rollover paragraph clarified: a 'triggered block' is one where the lottery is scheduled by the 2-of-3 / 1-of-3 frequency rule. Non-triggered blocks follow the normal 50/25/25 split and NEVER pay out the jackpot, even if pending > 0. The jackpot waits for the next scheduled lottery block. Same invariant now documented in docs/V11_SPEC.md, include/sost/lottery.h and src/lottery.cpp so any Phase 2 implementer reads it before touching consensus. No consensus or protocol behaviour change. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
